//: Distributed control-plane MCP server (AgentCore Runtime, Cognito-authed). Uses Claude Code's built-in OAuth flow — NO static Authorization header (a static header disables OAuth fallback and breaks on token expiry). On connect the runtime returns 401 + RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata, Claude Code discovers the Cognito authorization server, and runs an authorization-code + PKCE browser flow; tokens are stored in your keychain and auto-refreshed.
//distribution: clientId below is a PUBLIC Cognito client — authorization-code + PKCE, NO secret. PKCE (not a secret) protects the flow, so this id is safe to ship: anyone who installs the plugin uses it as-is, signs in as themselves, and lands as a read-only viewer until an operator adds their Cognito user to a group. No `claude mcp login` / secret step. To point at your OWN AgentCore runtime + Cognito pool, override with env vars: SUNSTEAD_CONTROL_URL and SUNSTEAD_CONTROL_CLIENT_ID. callbackPort 8080 must match the http://localhost:8080/callback redirect on the Cognito client.
//local-dev: A marketplace install has no `cleanroom` source on PYTHONPATH, so the stdio servers cannot run there — that path lives in .mcp.local.json for use from a repo checkout only.
